title: Gateway latency note

title: Billing export note
body: Billing export failed once and recovered after retry.

body: RabbitMQ operator restarts should be coordinated with queue drain windows.

body: Cache warmup took longer than expected during a deploy.

title: Postmortem template
body: The postmortem template includes customer impact, timeline, and remediation sections.

body: Search timeout was traced to a slow shard relocation.

title: Rollout checklist
body: Rollout checklist covers canary, metrics, logs, and rollback commands.

title: Worker retry note
body: Worker retries increased after a transient broker failure.

title: Alert routing issue
body: Alert routing sent pages to the wrong team for ten minutes.

title: Incident command roles
body: Incident command roles rotate weekly and must be documented in the ticket.

title: UI microcopy
body: Generic UI microcopy uses many common words that should not become aliases.

title: Network packet loss
body: Packet loss occurred between two availability zones.

title: Read replica readonly event
body: Read replica briefly rejected writes during promotion.

title: Secrets rotation
body: Rotate secrets before running production upgrade tasks.

title: Auth token expiration
body: A user token expired during a long-running task.

title: Metrics scrape gap
body: Metrics had a scrape gap during Prometheus restart.

title: Backup verification
body: Backup verification should restore into an isolated database.

title: Queue retry ticket
body: Queue retries were expected during downstream maintenance.

title: Release checklist
body: Release checklist includes smoke tests and migration checks.

title: Log ingestion lag
body: Log ingestion lag delayed debugging but did not require terminology changes.

title: Observability onboarding
body: New team onboarding includes metrics, traces, and logs links.

title: On-call handoff
body: On-call handoff should include active incidents and risky deployments.

title: Deploy rollback
body: Deploy rollback succeeded after an unhealthy canary.

title: Snapshot refresh
body: Runtime snapshot refresh was requested after terminology approval.

title: Index lifecycle
body: Index lifecycle policy rolls older documents to warm storage.

title: Memory pressure
body: Memory pressure on a worker was mitigated by lowering concurrency.

title: Timeout analysis
body: Timeout analysis did not reveal a new alias candidate.

title: Restore drill
body: Restore drills should run monthly against a disposable environment.

title: Marketing copy
body: Marketing copy contains product adjectives that should never become aliases.
